methodology: Refactored to Empowered-style OKRs: a small set of company objectives, linked source objectives, source-level key results, explicit team ownership, and limited use of High Integrity Commitments.
description: Preparation Objectives for the next quarter.
okrDesignPrinciples: Objectives describe meaningful business and customer outcomes, not feature delivery.
Key results measure source objectives, while source objectives map upward into a small set of company objectives.
Every key result names executing and supporting teams so accountability is explicit.
High Integrity Commitments are used sparingly and only for work that is materially deadline-sensitive.

companyObjectives.title: 2026-Q2 Make execution reliably repeatable
companyObjectives.statement: Improve the operating system behind the product so launches, service recovery, reliability, and cross-functional delivery become predictably repeatable.
companyObjectives.okrDesignNotes: Keeps teams accountable for operational outcomes and avoids turning roadmap delivery into a checklist of feature shipments.

companyObjectives.title: 2026-Q2 Turn product progress into economic leverage
companyObjectives.statement: Translate better customer and operational outcomes into stronger revenue quality, retention, and strategic leverage for the business.
companyObjectives.okrDesignNotes: Separates commercial results from activity metrics so leaders can evaluate whether product work is compounding into business value.

objectives.title: 2026-Q2 General Manager of Digital Lending outcome goal
objectives.objective: Prepare to improve Lending Product Launch Velocity for General Manager of Digital Lending by advancing rapid launch capability with servicing control through configurable lending products, partner connectivity, and automated servicing basics.

linkedCustomerKPIs.description: Speed at which new lending products or variants can be launched and iterated.

linkedBusinessKPIs.description: Margin created by the lending portfolio after servicing and collections costs.

keyResults.baseline: Baseline to be confirmed from quarterly reporting
keyResults.statement: Increase Lending Product Launch Velocity during the quarter.

executingTeams.teamName: Lending Origination & Servicing - Partner Channel Integration
executingTeams.intent: Lead the work to improve lending Product Launch Velocity via Partner and Channel Integration Layer.

supportingTeams.teamName: Risk, Finance & Expansion Platform - Reusable Templates
supportingTeams.intent: Support the KR by contributing capability for lending Product Launch Velocity, aligned with its focus on provide regulatory reporting, accounting, tenant governance, and adjacent-product expansion capabilities. This team specifically focuses on reusable templates via Reusable Product Templates and Composable Product Domain Reuse.

Support the KR by contributing capability for lending Product Launch Velocity, aligned with its focus on own loan product configuration, origination workflows, servicing, and credit policy execution. This team specifically focuses on loan servicing via Loan Product and Servicing Engine and Servicing Operations Workspace.

keyResults.commitmentRationale: This KR should be pursued as an outcome target with room for discovery, iteration, and tradeoff.

objectives.title: 2026-Q2 VP Product for Embedded Finance and BaaS outcome goal
objectives.objective: Prepare to improve Partner Go-Live Time for VP Product for Embedded Finance and BaaS by advancing partner launch repeatability through tenant setup, public apis, and operational controls that reduce time-to-live for new programs.

linkedCustomers.customerName: VP Product for Embedded Finance and BaaS
linkedCustomers.customerGroup: Fintechs, BaaS, and Embedded Finance Providers

linkedCustomerKPIs.customerName: VP Product for Embedded Finance and BaaS
linkedCustomerKPIs.description: Time required to onboard and launch a new partner or embedded-finance program.

linkedCustomerKPIs.customerName: VP Product for Embedded Finance and BaaS

linkedBusinessKPIs.customerName: VP Product for Embedded Finance and BaaS
linkedBusinessKPIs.description: Recurring revenue generated from live partner programs on the platform.

keyResults.baseline: Baseline to be confirmed from quarterly reporting
keyResults.statement: Decrease Partner Go-Live Time during the quarter.

executingTeams.intent: Lead the work to reduce partner Go-Live Time via Developer Platform and Public APIs and Partner Revenue and Performance Analytics.

supportingTeams.teamName: Risk, Finance & Expansion Platform - Reusable Templates
supportingTeams.intent: Support the KR by contributing capability for partner Go-Live Time, aligned with its focus on provide regulatory reporting, accounting, tenant governance, and adjacent-product expansion capabilities. This team specifically focuses on reusable templates via Reusable Product Templates and Composable Product Domain Reuse.

supportingTeams.teamName: Partner Platform & BaaS - Multi Tenant Runtime
supportingTeams.intent: Support the KR by contributing capability for partner Go-Live Time, aligned with its focus on own partner onboarding, tenancy, APIs, and embedded-finance integration workflows. This team specifically focuses on multi tenant runtime via Multi-tenant Runtime Controls and Reconciliation and Settlement Controls.

keyResults.commitmentRationale: This KR should be pursued as an outcome target with room for discovery, iteration, and tradeoff.
